title: Lynx Morph mod
description: Morph into unlocked mobs and use unique abilities with a synced multiplayer menu. (BETA)
body:
Ultimate Morph Mod [BETA]
Ultimate Morph Mod adds a full morph progression system to Fabric 1.21.11.
Unlock mobs by defeating them, transform through a searchable menu, and use mob-specific abilities in multiplayer.

Beta Notice
This project is in active development.
Expect balancing changes, feature updates, and occasional bugs between versions.

Features
Unlock morphs by killing mobs
Per-player saved morph progression
Morph menu with search, scrolling, icons, and tooltips
Demorph at any time
Multiplayer-synced morph states
Morph attribute adaptation:
Health
Size scaling
Movement speed
Ability system with many mob-specific powers, including:
Enderman teleport
Blaze/Ghast fireballs
Dragon breath projectile
Warden sonic boom
Evoker fangs
Camel dash
Llama/Trader Llama spit
Transformation particles and sounds
Fallback handling for additional entity types
Controls
G - Open Morph Menu
V - Use Morph Ability
Commands
/morph unlockall
/morph lockall
/morph unlock <entity_id>
Gamerule
Ability cooldowns on/off:
/gamerule morph-mod:ability_cooldowns true|false
(Default: true)

Requirements
Minecraft 1.21.11
Fabric Loader
Fabric API
Known Issues (BETA)
Some morph animations/models may still be incomplete depending on entity type
Ability tuning is ongoing
Modded-entity edge cases may occur
Feedback
Bug reports and feedback are welcome.
Please include:

Mod version
Minecraft/Fabric/Fabric API versions
Reproduction steps
latest.log or crash report
